title: Noem won't say if story about shooting her dog cost her Trump VP spot
shortDescription: South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem refused to directly address whether the story about her killing a dog affected her chance at being Trump's VP pick.

title: Trump, in fresh attack on migrants, floats UFC fight club for them
shortDescription: Donald Trump again used dehumanizing rhetoric toward immigrants, saying he has proposed to the UFC that it set up a 'migrant league of fighters.'

title: Conservative voters chant 'no dead babies' as Donald Trump addresses abortion
shortDescription: Trump's call for exceptions to abortion restrictions drew hecklers at the Faith & Freedom Coalition.

title: LGBTQ+ activists urge Biden, Dems to do more to fight anti-trans rhetoric
shortDescription: Democratic candidates countered anti-trans rhetoric in 2023 races. Now, advocates worry the party is shying away from the issue.

title: Trump doubles down on abortion restrictions, Louisiana Ten Commandments law
shortDescription: Speaking to a Faith & Freedom Coalition conference, Trump said states should make separate decisions on abortion policy.

title: Joe Biden allies raising $10 million to challenge Donald Trump social media machine
shortDescription: U.S. President Joe Biden's main reelection SuperPAC is raising millions of dollars to try to solve a problem vexing Democrats: how to compete with Republican Donald Trump's social media machine.

title: As Trump claims political bias, his lawyer is calling a prosecutor too independent
shortDescription: Donald Trump's lawyer argued that the criminal case charging the former U.S. president with mishandling classified documents should be thrown out because the prosecutor is too independent.

title: Trump's loyal ex-aide Sarah Huckabee Sanders awaits word on VP pick
shortDescription: Sarah Huckabee Sanders spent years defending Trump. People who worked with her say she'd be an ideal choice as his vice-presidential running mate.

title: Who are the Log Cabin Republicans? What LGBTQ+ group thinks of Trump.
shortDescription: Who are the Log Cabin Republicans, a conservative group that supports LGBTQ+ rights? What is their complicated history with Trump?

title: Trump challenges special counsel's existence in Florida courtroom
shortDescription: At a Friday hearing, former President Donald Trump challenged the legitimacy of Special Counsel Jack Smith's appointment.

title: Post misquotes Biden about campaign, war in Vietnam | Fact check
shortDescription: In an interview, Biden said he originally ran for office to reduce the prospect of war "because of" Vietnam. It wasn't a reference to this campaign.

title: Trump and Alvin Bragg still fighting over hush money case gag order
shortDescription: Donald Trump has been convicted in his hush money case but is still under a gag order. He wants it lifted but the Manhattan DA is pushing back.

title: No, this photo doesn't show Trump needing help to walk | Fact check
shortDescription: While the photo shows former President Donald Trump holding the hand of his son, Donald Trump Jr., he wasn't being held steady.

title: Judge Cannon in Trump case under fire, what to know
shortDescription: Judge Cannon has been criticized for delaying the case on Trump’s handling of classified documents. And colleagues have asked for her to step aside.

title: Trump's classified docs case begins 3 days of hearings | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: The Supreme Court upholds a controversial tax on foreign income. Excessive heat continues, and is as dangerous for animals as it is for people.

title: Melinda Gates backs Biden in first presidential endorsement
shortDescription: Melinda French Gates announced Thursday that she will be voting for President Joe Biden in the 2024 election.

title: Supreme Court upholds law banning domestic abusers from owning guns
shortDescription: Despite the Supreme Court's recent history of siding with gun rights the justices said some limits are permissible. Clarence Thomas was the lone dissenter.

title: Trial verdict helps Trump outpace Biden in May fundraising
shortDescription: Trump and the RNC raised $141 in May, compared with $85 million for Biden and the Democratic National Committee.
